programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Tombstone Vendetta'. When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in Tombstone, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - Pressure'. With the season in full swing, Shawn brings in family to help reach his goal. The Kellys try to get familiar with their new claims and a familiar newcomer joins the fray.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
George Of The Jungle
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - The Vegemaster/ Eagle Tick'. The VegeMaster challenges George's title as king and George learns how to fly.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Ghost Bust a Move'. Ghostbust a Move When Jimmy's dad decides to move the family away from Deedstown, Casper and his friends vow to stop Mr. Bradley from selling their house.

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Giant Jelly'. When Noddy sees the empty tray the jelly was on at the Skittles' birthday party, it gives him an idea for a game. So the Skittles' use the giant jelly tray as a slide.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Olivia Plans A Tea Party'. When Olivia's Mom gets sick, she steps up and helps plan a tea party and not just any old tea party, but a pirate tea party.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Olivia's Tip Top Tapper'. Olivia hurts her leg on the eve of her big tap dance recital. Taking inspiration from her baby brother's rolling walker, she builds herself a fancy apparatus, so that she can dance as scheduled.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Why Elephant Has A Trunk'. Why does Elephant have a trunk? Well, you see one day Crocodile was feeling particularly snappy...

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Why Snake Has No Legs'. Why doesn't Snake have legs? Well, you see he swapped a thousand of his legs for Millipede's two eyes.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Case Of The Broken Crystal Memory Game'. All the toys are ready to start the DareDale Challenge race, which culminates in the competitors successfully completing the Crystal Memory Game in the DareDale Caves.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Case Of The Amazing Eyebrows'. It's the day of the Best Toy Award in Toyland and Fuse is the winner!

programme.title: Veggietales: In The House
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Laura At Bat / Pie Fight!'. Laura thinks she only has to dream she's a great athlete to be a great athlete. It's sour grapes for Madame Blueberry when she loses a baking contest.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Liam The Hero'. In order to get a ticket to a Manga convention she desperately wants, Birch agrees to write a series of Manga strips featuring Liam as a suave, cool and heroic character.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - True Colors'. When Raffi joins Amelia's rock band, Birch follows on his heels as the band's manager. Soon she's writing songs that pit her and Raffi against their podmates.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Miss President'. Birch runs for school president because she wants to see changes to the Art program at Cosmos High. On a whim, Liam gets involved.

programme.title: 3-2-1 Penguins!
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. Jason and Michelle set off a series of practical jokes on board the ship. None of which turn out to be very funny to their victims.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 'S2/E40 - Ghost Writer/The Ghost Magnet'. Casper and Jimmy's favourite scary stories author is in Deedstown to sign his latest book. Graham has created a ghost magnet that is supposed to attract ghosts.

programme.title: Where's Wally?
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - A New York Minute'. The Wanderers head to Moscow to fix the Grow Key, but accidentally make themselves smaller! So begins a mini Nutcracker journey to retrieve the key from Odlulu and Fritz.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Luck'. Puss learns that black is the new orange when a curse transforms him into an unlucky black cat. Cast out of town he must learn how to break the spell.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
Trolls: The Beat Goes On
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Hair-Jitsu/Crushin' It'. Branch must learn the importance of patience when Poppy teaches him 'hair-jitsu'. Smidge's crush on a critter-narian leads her to tone down her Smidge-ness.

programme.title: Turbo Fast

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 of 52 - Downhill Rivet'. Charley sets up a ski slope for Rivet, but Rivet keeps falling over. Charley heads out on to a snowy mountain to show Rivet how it's done but discovers that skiing isn't that easy after all.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 of 52 - Sandcastle For Caramel'. Charley builds a playhouse for Caramel but it keeps falling down. At the beach, he tries to build some sandcastles to cheer Caramel up.

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Boo to You'. Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.desc: 'S8/E20 of 50 - Casino Challenge'. The stakes are high when the forge floor is transformed into the Forged in Fire Casino. Four smiths must leave it all up to chance and allow the Wheel of Forging to determine their challenge.

programme.title: Disasters Engineered
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Take-Off To Tragedy'. Every year around 40 million flights take off and land across the world. Air France 447's highly automated design was thought to make flights safer but contributed to the deaths of all on board.

programme.title: Massive Engineering Mistakes
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - 2/3'. In Miami, why did a state-of-the-art bridge dramatically collapse during construction? And was a bold new skyscraper really going to topple on downtown Boston?

programme.title: The Unxplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 of 10 - Mysterious Ancient Ruins'. Ancient ruins fascinate us, and some archaeological finds are so baffling that they challenge everything we know about the past. Will we ever learn the truth about these mysterious ruins?

programme.title: Historic Hauntings
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - England'. England's castle walls have witnessed centuries of bloodshed. This programme presents spine tingling stories in a riveting tour of England's ghostly heritage.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: 'S4/E11 - Strong Arm'. At Rick Dale's Las Vegas antique restoration shop, a customer walks through the doors with a unique 1950s arm wrestling game.

programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Eelectrocution'. Rob and Adam test the Yellow Head Moray Eel for possible venom effects, but must resort to a risky, bloody bite. But venom is not the issue for their next animal: the Electric Eel.

programme.title: Alone: Polar Bear Island
programme.desc: 'S9/E11 of 11 - Fight, Flight Or Freeze'. The remaining three participants continue to battle Labrador's harsh snowstorms and below-freezing temperatures. Pushed to the limit, they struggle more than ever before.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: 'S14/E10 of 20 - The Time Benders'. Today, more people than ever before believe that UFOs are of alien origin. But if extraterrestrials have come to Earth from lightyears away, could they be capable of bending both time and space?

programme.title: Legends Of The Pharaohs
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Downfall Of A Dynasty'. A series of legendary pharaohs have built the most iconic monuments in history. But religious transformation, climate change, and a weak pharaoh bring the age of the pyramids to a crushing end.

programme.title: Westall '66: A Suburban UFO Mystery
programme.desc: Forty-four years after hundreds of students, teachers and local residents who witnessed a UFO fly over an Australian suburb were silenced by authorities, amateur detective Shane Ryan goes back to examine the mystery.

programme.title: UFOS: Secret Missions Exposed
programme.desc: Is it possible that governments have been hiding top-secret space missions? Is there something dangerous that NASA has been covering up? What will it take for these secret space missions to be exposed?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S9/E18 - Who Wet the Sheets?'. The hunt for treasure continues among the lockers of Riverside, California. Jarrod and Brandi try to teach a lesson to Bozek, but the price of education may be too high.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S9/E19 - Santa Ana Surprise'. Santa Ana, California hosts auctions that bring out the buyers in full force. Jarrod and Brandi's plans go awry, and Mary is hoping to break a losing streak.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S9/E20 - High Scores in Arcadia'. The upper-class area of Arcadia promises solid auctions for the buyers. Darrell and Brandon come out swinging, but get caught trying to pull some shenanigans.

programme.desc: 'S24/E34 of 44'. Ons proe 'n kernfisikus se rooibostee, ontmoet toutrek-wêreldkampioen en vegter, Cameron Saaiman, asook 'n eertydse karwag wat nou 'n winkelsentrum bestuur en oud-diplomaat Riaan Eksteen.

programme.title: Wie's Nuus

programme.title: Hier Gaan Ons Alweer
programme.desc: 'S21/E9 of 13'. Die meer-en-see toer skop af en die manne sê mekaar die stryd aan vir die lekkerste vis. 'Meermanne' Petri en Werner vang reuse kabeljoue om die manne op die strand se mooi vangste te troef.

programme.title: Jan Braai Vir Erfenis
programme.desc: 'S12/E22 of 26'. In dié week se episode kyk ons na gevulde kos op die braaivuur. Burgers, steaks, chops, ribbetjies, hoender, groente en pastei. Hoe vul jy hom en hoe braai jy hom.

programme.title: Aangetroud
programme.desc: Wanneer Lisa met die liefde van haar lewe trou besef sy baie vinnig haar skoonfamilie is nie ewe ingenome met haar nie. Miskien is 'n kleurvolle vakansie dalk 'n oplossing.

programme.title: Die Real Housewives van Pretoria
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 of 14'. Kiki en Mel is by 'n boksgeveg tussen bekendes waar Mel, Kiki se ware bedoelings begin bevraagteken. Tydens Rhona se Ou Klere Funksie daag 'n ongenooide gas op wat nie almal beïndruk nie.

programme.title: The Night Before
programme.desc: Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Seth Rogen and Anthony Mackie make up a hazardous trio of friends that turn Christmas on its head, in this heartfelt, chaos filled comedy.

programme.title: Off The Rails
programme.desc: A funny and touching comedy about three women who reunite to fulfil their deceased friend's wish: to relive their youth European train adventures with her teenage daughter.

programme.title: Kiss The Cook
programme.desc: This romantic comedy revolves around food, family, and love. A food blogger lands a cookbook deal, but she's not a good cook, so she gets help from a chef.

programme.title: Love Type D
programme.desc: A hilarious comedy about a woman who is unlucky in love. Seeking answers, she turns to science and discovers she has the loser in love gene. Can she change her fate?

programme.title: Vic The Viking And The Magic Sword
programme.desc: A great kids animation. The son of the Viking Chief, who compensates for his lack of Viking physicality with intelligence, uses his intellect to help solve his father's mistake.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend Of The Seven Seas
programme.desc: Brad Pitt and Catherine Zeta-Jones star in this animation. The legendary Sinbad embarks on a dangerous journey. He must clear his name after being framed by the goddess Eris.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: Looking for a family film with a moral and Jerry Seinfeld's observational humour? Then the story of Barry, the bee who leaves the hive for a big adventure, is just up your path.

programme.title: Pinocchio A True Story
programme.desc: This animated film reinvents the classic tale. Pinocchio joins a travelling circus to see the world, where he falls in love with gymnast Bella and wishes to be human.

programme.title: A Journal For Jordan
programme.desc: Denzel Washington directs this touching love story inspired by a true story and a memoir. A soldier in Iraq writes a journal filled with advice for his young son.

programme.title: Reminiscence
programme.desc: Hugh Jackman leads a great cast that drives this cerebral sci-fi. A case a private investigator of the mind is navigating becomes an obsession after his client disappears.

programme.title: Nikki Glaser: Good Clean Filth
programme.desc: In a manner that is brutally honest yet conversational, watch comedian Nikki Glaser explore a range of topics often considered 'taboo' in her first HBO comedy special.

programme.title: Undercurrent: The Disappearance Of...
programme.desc: 'Undercurrent: The Disappearance Of Kim Wall Part 2: The Punishment'. Disturbing details emerge during Madsen's trial, depicting an unrepentant killer with misogynistic and sociopathic tendencies.

programme.title: Barnyard
programme.desc: A fun farm tale that even adults will enjoy. Kevin James lends his voice to this animation as a carefree cow who is suddenly put in charge of the other animals.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Julia Roberts won an Oscar for her role in this inspiring true story. A single mom becomes a legal assistant and takes on a company that is polluting a city's water supply.

programme.title: The Naturalist: The Life And Times...
programme.desc: 'The Naturalist: The Life And Times Of The Remarkable Marjorie Cortenay-Latime'. This doccie looks at a fish that was assumed to be extinct 66 million years ago and the woman who found it.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Jack Black enters the mystic world of martial arts in this animated adventure. An obese, mild-mannered panda is thrown into the middle of a battle for the fate of China.

programme.title: Lena And Snowball
programme.desc: A charming coming-of-age movie that revolves around a friendship between a teenage girl and a white lion. Lena discovers a white lion cub and has to protect it from poachers.

programme.title: Ainbo: Spirit Of The Amazon
programme.desc: An epic animated adventure. A young hero and her Spirit Guides embark on a quest to save their home in the spectacular Amazon rainforest.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Michael Bay and Shia LaBeouf bring the 80s cartoon hit to life in this action epic. A teenage boy is caught in the middle of an eternal struggle between two alien robot races.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman and Tommy Lee Jones star in this enjoyable action-comedy. An ex FBI Agent and ex-mob lawyer are forced to put aside their differences to fend off a potential mob hit.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Sandra Bullock and Channing Tatum team up for this rom-com adventure. A romance novelist and her cover model get swept up in a kidnapping that lands them in a jungle adventure.

programme.title: French Exit
programme.desc: In this quirky comedy based on a novel, Michelle Pfeiffer stars as an ageing socialite who is nearly broke. She moves to Paris with her son (Lucas Hedges) and cat for a fresh start.

programme.title: 2022 VALORANT Oceania Tour
programme.desc: '2022 VALORANT Oceania Tour - OCE Championship'. The best of the best have fought their way through the 2022 VALORANT Oceania Tour to find themselves at the OCE Champs. Which team will represent the Oceanic region on the world stage?

programme.desc: 'Videogame Nation - Call of Duty: Advanced Warfare'. Call of Duty: Advanced Warfare is in the sights this time as Dan, John and Aoife delve into what makes military shooters so popular and learn the unique charm of Exo Zombies.

programme.title: Apex
programme.desc: Hunters become the hunted in this action thriller in which Bruce Willis, as a man on a deserted island, turns the tables on five elite hunters paid to hunt him down.

programme.title: Thank You For Your Service
programme.desc: Miles Teller takes centre stage in this hard-hitting, poignant war drama. A group of soldiers return home from Iraq and struggle to integrate back into society.

programme.title: Born A Champion
programme.desc: An intense mixed martial arts film. A retired marine skilled in jiu-jitsu gets a chance to restore his fighting reputation when he gets a rematch against an old opponent.

programme.title: Ski Patrol
programme.desc: Quirky comedy with plenty of slapstick humour. A group of misfits work at a ski resort, where they soon have to band together to stop a developer from closing them down.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic Chinese historical action film centred on the heroic escapades of the legendary warrior Guan Yu in a nation torn apart by politics and civil conflict.

programme.title: Trapped By My Sugar Daddy
programme.desc: A mother's instinct is always right. A young woman learns this lesson in this thriller when she starts dating a charming older man who her mother had a bad feeling about.

programme.title: The Losers
programme.desc: Based on the popular comic book series, this action film starring an all-star cast sees an elite Special Forces Unit seek revenge after they are double-crossed on a mission.

programme.title: Forsaken
programme.desc: A space mission goes awry in this sci-fi film. An astronaut left on Mars asks for aid to return home but instead becomes the subject of a reality TV show as he tries to survive.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson puts his body on the line in this heart-thumping action film. A security expert infiltrates a burning skyscraper when his family is taken hostage.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Tom Holland and Mark Wahlberg team up to bring this iconic video game franchise to life. A seasoned treasure hunter recruits Street-smart Nathan Drake to recover a fortune.

programme.title: Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins
programme.desc: Henry Golding and Andrew Koji drive this action-packed G.I. Joe spin-off. A tenacious loner is welcomed into an ancient Japanese clan, but his honour and loyalty are tested.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: Margot Robbie, Idris Elba and John Cena propel this sequel to the 2016 film. A task force of convicted supervillains undertakes a deadly mission on the island of Corto Maltese.

programme.title: Hungry Ghosts
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 of 4'. An intriguing four-part ghost drama that explores the trauma of war as a terrifying spirit causes havoc in the Vietnamese-Australian community during the Hungry Ghost Festival.

programme.title: The Miracle Season
programme.desc: Uplifting sports drama. After the tragic death of a star volleyball player, a team of dispirited high school girls must band together to win the state championship.

programme.title: The Wrong Prince Charming
programme.desc: Not all is as it seems in this Vivica A Fox thriller. An entrepreneur meets a famed prince about investing in one of her properties but soon discovers he's not what he seems.

programme.title: Fatal Frenemies
programme.desc: A suspenseful thriller. A mother tries to figure out who could have framed her daughter, who is accused of murdering a high school track teammate.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries: Murder...
programme.desc: 'Morning Show Mysteries: Murder Ever After'. After finding bones in the basement of an old friend's house, Billie Blessings works with the new Head of Homicide to solve the case.

programme.title: Who Am I?
programme.desc: An exciting update of Jackie Chan's 1998 classic action comedy. A delivery person finds his life turned upside down after he falls into amnesia and is framed for murder.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: In this action film, Jason Momoa does everything in his power to defend the ones he loves. A logger fights to protect his family from a dangerous group of drug runners.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves returns as the lethal assassin in this non-stop action thriller. John Wick comes out of retirement to help an old associate, pitting him against deadly killers.

programme.title: Blood Conscious
programme.desc: A horrifying thriller. A vacationing family turns the tables on a mass shooter who claims to be fighting demonic forces.

programme.title: Halo

programme.title: The Kings Of Napa
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 of 8 - How Stella Got Her Pinot Back'. Otis admits to stealing grapes but denies the extortion. Suddenly, August realizes that Bridgette might in fact be the extortionist after all.

programme.title: The Kings Of Napa
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Mo Bottled Blues'. A power outage at the King estate leads the family to learn shocking information about its past and present.

programme.title: The 4400

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Way We Were'. Keisha hears the truth about the day she lost her sister, moving her to take a chance. Shanice and Andre enjoy a day out. Hayden and Mariah grow closer.

programme.title: Special - Celebrity Scars and the...

programme.title: The Ultimate Warrior
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars in this explosive sci-fi thriller set in a futuristic New York. Only a few still live in the city where two rival gangs are at war.

programme.title: Buffalo Soldiers
programme.desc: An American army clerk stationed in Berlin wheels and deals illegally in army supplies. He lives the good life until he sets out to seduce his sergeant's pretty daughter.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: Three groomsmen lose their about-to-be-wed buddy during their drunken misadventures. They must retrace their steps in order to find him.

programme.title: Django Unchained

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: Teenager Sean Anderson teams with his stepfather on a mission to find his grandfather, who is thought to be missing on a mythical island.

programme.title: Police Story II
programme.desc: While investigating a suspected terrorist attack, Chan's (Jackie Chan) girlfriend becomes the kidnap target, so he must confront his adversaries to save his girl.

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage drives this action thriller. A hunter catches a white jaguar, but all hell breaks loose when he ships it on the same ship as an arrested assassin.

programme.title: Spree

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Tom Hanks stars in the Oscar-nominated film based on a true story of a captain and his crew who faced their fears head-on as they were hijacked by Somali pirates.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk

programme.title: Martelize Se Stamtafel
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. In dié kook-en-geselsprogram kuier die radio-omroeper, Martelize Brink, met bekendes in haar kombuis en kook disse uit hul plek van herkoms. Haar gaste leer ook meer oor hul eie stambome.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E6'. Alan en Frances Webster het 30 jaar gelede met skaars 20 koeie naby Weenen in KZN begin melk. Vandag is daar meer as 1 200 koeie in produksie en dié egpaar woeker moedig voort.

programme.title: Musiekpaniek
programme.desc: 'S8/E8'. Die week het Synth Peter die plaas verruil vir Musiekpaniek se diskoligte. Hy en Carla Mackenzie kyk hoe vier van sy aanhangers dit uitbaklei vir 'n lekker prys.

programme.title: Houvrou of Trouvrou?
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Dis die halfpadmerk in die stryd om SA se top-trouvrou te kroon en Chanté en Leandri is bo-aan die punteleer. Dié keer kyk ons of die vroue tussen die lyne kan lees of hul intuïsie moet slyp. Wie's 'n stap nader aan die R500 000?

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai: Familie En Vriende
programme.desc: 'S3/E4'. Ons gunstelingtydverdryf is nou 'n sosiale eksperiment. Drie paartjies wat mekaar nie ken nie, braai by mekaar en heelwat gebeur om die vuur. En ons praat nie net van die lekker kos nie!
